videos.headline: Jackson keeps read-option and scores opening-drive TD
videos.description: Buffalo QB Tyree Jackson keeps the ball and powers through the goal line for a two-yard score giving Buffalo a 7-0 lead over the Florida Atlantic.

videos.headline: Buffalo secondary intercepts Driskel on first drive
videos.description: Following an opening-drive score, the Buffalo defense gives the ball right back to their offense with a Ryan Williamson interception.

videos.headline: Two drives, two rushing touchdowns for QB Jackson
videos.description: Tyree Jackson and the Buffalo offense jump to a 14-0 first quarter lead against Florida Atlantic following a 6-yard Jackson TD run.

videos.headline: Owls answer with quick rushing TD
videos.description: Florida Atlantic RB Kerrith Whyte Jr. sprints up the sideline for a 37-yard score for the Owls' first TD against Buffalo.

videos.headline: FAU's Singletary ties the game with TD
videos.description: Owls' RB Devin Singletary goes untouched up the middle for a 34-yard score that ties the Bulls 14-14.

videos.headline: Wright's big return gives Owls' offense good field position
videos.description: Florida Atlantic's Willie Wright extends toward the sideline and cuts it up 28 yards to set up the Owls for an eventual field goal that gives them a 17-14 lead against Buffalo.

videos.headline: Anderson's strong run gives Buffalo lead
videos.description: Buffalo RB Theo Anderson battles through Owls' defenders to break the goal line and bring the Bulls ahead 24-17.

videos.headline: Singletary jumps outside for second score
videos.description: RB Devin Singletary is patient and eventually finds space to the goal line for his second rushing touchdown to bring the Owls within three of the Bulls.

videos.headline: Singletary lowers shoulder for third score
videos.description: The Owls turn to Devin Singletary on the goal line and the running back powers his way across the plane. The Owls trail the Bulls 34-31 late in the fourth.

videos.headline: In back and forth battle, Buffalo emerges with narrow victory
videos.description: Buffalo overcame an injury to their starting QB Tyree Jackson to beat Florida Atlantic 34-31 despite the Owls rushing for 262 total yards.
